name: Nelke & the Legendary Alchemists ~Ateliers of the New World~
short_description: Atelier 20th Anniversary Title An Atelier town built together with legendary alchemists. This title aims to combine the “slice-of-life” atmosphere of living in a town and collaborating with various characters and the exaltation that comes from successfully governing a town and expanding your world.
detailed_description:
Crossover characters are from these games:

Atelier Marie Remake: The Alchemist of Salburg Atelier Sophie 2: The Alchemist of the Mysterious Dream Atelier Lydie & Suelle: The Alchemists and the Mysterious Paintings DX Atelier Firis: The Alchemist and the Mysterious Journey DX Atelier Sophie: The Alchemist of the Mysterious Book DX Atelier Shallie: Alchemists of the Dusk Sea DX Atelier Escha & Logy: Alchemists of the Dusk Sky DX Atelier Ayesha: The Alchemist of Dusk DX Atelier Meruru ~The Apprentice of Arland~ DX Atelier Totori ~The Adventurer of Arland~ DX Atelier Rorona ~The Alchemist of Arland~ DX


About the Game

Atelier 20th Anniversary Title An Atelier town built together with legendary alchemists. This title aims to combine the “slice-of-life” atmosphere of living in a town and collaborating with various characters and the exaltation that comes from successfully governing a town and expanding your world. This title is designed to represent a new milestone in the evolution of the “Atelier” series, marking their 20th anniversary, and its theme is: Town-management Simulation x RPG. We aim to provide our fans with an entirely new "Atelier" experience, while also inviting back many popular characters of past titles.
about_the_game:
Atelier 20th Anniversary Title
An Atelier town built together with legendary alchemists.

This title aims to combine the “slice-of-life” atmosphere of living in a town and collaborating with various characters and the exaltation that comes from successfully governing a town and expanding your world.

This title is designed to represent a new milestone in the evolution of the “Atelier” series, marking their 20th anniversary, and its theme is: Town-management Simulation x RPG.

We aim to provide our fans with an entirely new "Atelier" experience, while also inviting back many popular characters of past titles.
supported_languages:
English, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
